title: Minecraft classic+
description: This modpack will bring back the old atmosphere to the new version of the game, as well as add unrealized ideas from the old versions.
body:
This build will return the game to its former atmosphere and some unrealized ideas from previous versions, such as Pigman.

Author's mods

Кожано-Кольчужная броня (Leather and Chain mail armor)

Свиночеловек (Pigman)

dirt grass

craft enchgoldapple

Not author's mods
architectury ([https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api))


NostalgicTweaks ([https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks/versions))


Write your problem here or if you found a bug in the modpack
[https://discord.gg/Eam47BBM](https://discord.gg/Eam47BBM)
